results.name: forged_genesis_frame
results.claim: Attacker constructs a genesis frame with their key claiming target's identity

results.name: fork_attempt
results.claim: Two divergent streams from same prefix — both verify, but verifier sees they fork
results.detail: fork is detectable by external observer

results.name: wrong_suite_in_stream
results.claim: Frame with wrong crypto_suite tag in PQ stream rejected

results.name: key_substitution
results.claim: Frame's agent_key swapped to attacker's key while keeping target's signature

results.name: partial_segment_no_starting_hash
results.claim: Partial segment verification without starting_chain_hash defaults to genesis (correctly fails)

results.name: partial_segment_with_starting_hash
results.claim: Partial segment verification works correctly with explicit starting_chain_hash

results.name: large_stream_50_frames
results.claim: Stream of 50 frames verifies in single segment without errors

results.name: duplicate_frame_id_within_segment
results.claim: Two frames with same frame_id (one duplicated) blocked by verifier replay tracking

results.name: wrong_protocol_string
results.claim: Frame with bogus protocol string rejected

results.name: empty_segment_rejected
results.claim: Empty list of frames cleanly rejected

results.name: user_identity_cannot_stream
results.claim: User identity (kind='user') cannot create activity stream
results.detail: raised AcreoError: only agent identities can produce activity streams (got kind='user')

results.name: convenience_methods_advance_chain
results.claim: Identity.record_* methods advance the chain across multiple calls
results.detail: 3 frames, chain advances correctly, all verify
